title: CraftableHockey
body:
# <center>Installation</center>

1. Put the downloaded file in datapack folder and resourcepack folder, and enable resourcepack.
2. Resourcepack need Optifine for forge/neoforge, for fabric/quilt need [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) and [NBT Recipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-recipes)
#   <center>About</center>
**CraftableHockey** - This is datapack that adds Ice Hockey minigame. All items can be crafted in survival mode, you can also build your own game arena.

![ice hockey](https://i.imgur.com/m0MJO82.gif)
# 
### 3 types of Hockey Sticks
![Hockey Sticks](https://i.imgur.com/oBujTE9.gif)

**1.Default Hockey Stick**
- ![Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0beba37e7ff87fb9e13dd97f55bdb2bf5acbe49f.png)

**2.Reinforced Hockey Stick**
- ![Reinforced Hockey Stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/360c411684d95322ff0b35f87a1497d07f80a3ec.png)

**3.Reinforced Hockey Stick+**
- ![Reinforced Hockey Stick+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0728f81d9cd3b3de8af24ce9f4cc6972512613a.png)

# 

### Puck cleaner

Can easily clean pucks.

![Pucks Cleaner](https://i.imgur.com/CnSFHas.gif)

###  Trap remover
The fastest way to break all the cobwebs.
Tip: You can stop puck using cobwebs.
![Trap Remover](https://imgur.com/9bkwNaA.gif)

## Crafts
### Items

**1.Puck**
- ![puck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1f3231951150d8f1c2bf409b60bf27fafc6fb65.png)

**2.Trap Remover**
- ![Trap Remover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a822a01f3ff2ab86aae4d1114e3e6b0c98948fd6.png)

**3.Puck cleaner**
- ![Puck cleaner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2407b0fa747d3ea0a1084187725d846d84fe08.png)
